title: Distant Horizons Dimension Toggler
description: Lets you whitelist dimensions in which DH rendering is enabled.
body:
**Note: this is a verly early project so any feedback would be appreciated.**


Distant Horizons Dimension toggler or DHDT makes it so distant horizons rendering is enabled or disabled according to a whitelist (only enabled in the end and the overworld by default) 

![nether fog with dh rendering off](https://i.redd.it/ryqjf2gabhv31.png)
![overworld](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmedia.forgecdn.net%2Fattachments%2F880%2F249%2Fdh-512-rd.jpg&n=-1)

**Current Features:**
Disables dh rendering in non whitelisted dimensions (overworld and end)
Fixes issues on modded dimensions that are caused by dh (E.g. cosmic horizons)

**Planned Features:**
Config option to set a whitelist/blacklist
